description: IQ-TREE 2 maximum-likelihood tree with automatic model selection (-m TEST), ultrafast bootstrap (-B) and SH-aLRT (aligned FASTA -> Newick treefile).
rules: read-only on inputs; writes outputs (phylo.treefile + IQ-TREE side files) under record_store
model is auto-selected via -m TEST; bootstrap defaults to 1000 ultrafast replicates
requires the iqtree2 binary on PATH; without it the porter degrades gracefully and emits {}
usage: Set ALIGNED_FASTA (an alignment). Optional SEQ_TYPE (nt|aa, default nt), BOOTSTRAP (default 1000), THREADS (default 4), OUTGROUP. Output: phylo.treefile.
limitation: Needs IQ-TREE 2 installed (conda install -c bioconda iqtree). Offline / without iqtree2 the tree is not produced; the output is a graceful {} placeholder. Needs >=4 taxa for bootstrap.
